project_info.name: SyncPlay RU (Thesis Project)
project_info.description: A real-time synchronized multimedia web app for listening parties. UI strictly in Russian. System fonts only, no external CDNs.
project_info.archetype: Swiss High-Contrast mixed with Tactical Minimalism

rules: NO GOOGLE FONTS. NO EXTERNAL FONT FILES.
Use system-ui for all sans-serif text.
Use monospace for time codes, room codes, and sync indicators.

families.sans: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
families.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Courier New', monospace

scales.h1_room_code: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-black tracking-tighter text-zinc-50 font-mono

surfaces_and_effects.glass_panel: bg-zinc-900/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl shadow-black/50
surfaces_and_effects.interactive_card: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 hover:border-cyan-500/50 hover:bg-zinc-800/50 transition-colors duration-200 rounded-xl

Button.primary: bg-cyan-500 text-black font-bold hover:bg-cyan-400 active:scale-95 transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(6,182,212,0.3)]
Button.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-white hover:bg-zinc-700 border border-zinc-700 transition-all

Slider.thumb: w-4 h-4 bg-white rounded-full shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(6,182,212,0.8)] border-2 border-cyan-500 cursor-pointer

Input.base: bg-zinc-900/50 border-zinc-700 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-500 focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-cyan-500 focus-visible:border-cyan-500 rounded-lg h-12

login_join.layout: min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-[#09090B] bg-[radial-gradient(circle_at_top,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-cyan-900/20 via-zinc-950 to-zinc-950
login_join.card: w-full max-w-md p-8 bg-zinc-900/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl

room.layout: h-screen flex flex-col bg-[#09090B] overflow-hidden p-2 md:p-4 gap-4
room.header: h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6 bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-md
room.main_grid: flex-1 grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 min-h-0
room.player_area: col-span-1 lg:col-span-8 flex flex-col gap-4 bg-zinc-900/30 border border-zinc-800/50 rounded-xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden
room.sidebar: col-span-1 lg:col-span-4 flex flex-col gap-4 min-h-0
room.chat_panel: flex-1 flex flex-col bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden
room.participants_panel: h-1/3 bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl p-4 overflow-hidden

player_controls.cover_art: w-48 h-48 md:w-64 md:h-64 rounded-xl shadow-2xl border border-white/5 object-cover mx-auto flex items-center justify-center bg-zinc-800
player_controls.play_pause_btn: w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-cyan-500 text-black flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-cyan-400 hover:scale-105 transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(6,182,212,0.4)]
player_controls.secondary_btn: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-zinc-800 text-white flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-zinc-700 transition-all
player_controls.seek_bar_container: w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto mt-8 flex items-center gap-4
player_controls.volume_container: flex items-center gap-3 w-48 mx-auto mt-6

rules: Use Lucide-React for all icons (Play, Pause, Volume2, VolumeX, Upload, Users, MessageSquare, Music).
For missing ID3 cover art, use a CSS gradient with a large Lucide Music icon in the center.
CSS Gradient for Cover Fallback: className='bg-gradient-to-br from-zinc-800 to-zinc-950 flex items-center justify-center'

data_testid_conventions.rules: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role.
